# RYGGHJÄLP — Premium Spa & Massage

Professional massage therapy and premium spa treatments in Sweden.

## Pages

- [Home](/) — Main page with services overview
- [Classic Massage](/services/classic) — Traditional Swedish massage
- [Anti-Cellulite Massage](/services/anti-cellulite) — Targeted cellulite treatment
- [Sports Massage](/services/sports) — Athletic recovery and performance
- [Lymphatic Drainage](/services/lymphatic-drainage) — Gentle detox therapy
- [Cupping Massage](/services/cupping) — Ancient cupping technique
- [Hot Stone Massage](/services/hot-stone) — Heated volcanic stone therapy
- [Turkish Foam Massage](/services/turkish-foam) — Traditional foam cleansing
- [Eco-Organic Massage](/services/natural-massage) — Natural oil treatment
- [Gallery](/gallery) — Studio photos
- [Contacts](/contacts) — Book appointment
